data.location: 12 Royce Circle, Storrs Center, Storrs, CT
data.short_description: Chipotle filed for building permits on May 11th to convert the current Gansett Wraps space at 12 Royce Circle into a new Chipotle restaurant. The permits call for a fit-out of the existing space in a 5-story mixed-use building, with exterior and interior alterations. No opening date has been announced.

data.location: 33 Wilbur Cross Way (former Tang Karaoke Bar), Storrs Center, Storrs, CT
data.short_description: Gansett Wraps is building out a new space at 33 Wilbur Cross Way inside Storrs Center, the former Tang Karaoke Bar location. The new space is described as slightly larger than their current location and with improved parking. No opening date has been announced.

data.location: Westfarms Mall (next to Lovisa, second floor), West Hartford, CT
data.status: Look for them to open this summer!
data.short_description: Swiss chocolatier Läderach is coming soon to Westfarms mall next to Lovisa on the second floor. The brand produces over 100 varieties of chocolates including FrischSchoggi, pralines, truffles, and seasonal creations. No specific opening date was provided.

data.location: Westfarms Mall (next to Alo), West Hartford, CT
data.short_description: The North Face has relocated within Westfarms mall to a new space next to Alo, with a brand new look. No specific opening date was given in the article.

data.location: Westfarms Mall (center court, near Claire's), West Hartford, CT
data.short_description: Riviera French Cafe is now open as a kiosk in the mall's center court serving coffee, espresso beverages, stuffed crepes, pastries, and French-inspired food. This is the second location for the Sarasota-based cafe.

The Plourd Brewery opened at 1277 Main Street in East Hartford, the former Paddle Creek Beer Company space, celebrating their opening on May 2nd. The brewery is owned by husband and wife Tyler and Melissa Plourd and focuses on contemporary hoppy beers and European-inspired lagers.

data.event_date: Not specified (soft opened earlier in the week of the article)
data.short_description: Xtrait Perfumery has opened at 968A Farmington Avenue in West Hartford, the former home of Center Framing & Art, with a soft open and more perfumes still to come. It is described as the first niche fragrance boutique in CT focused on independent brands not found in malls.

data.location: 348 Middle Turnpike West, Manchester Parkade, Manchester, CT
data.short_description: Joey'z Shopping Spree will be permanently closing their Manchester location in the coming weeks. The store is currently liquidating with items between 10% and 70% off, with mark-downs expected to increase.

data.location: State House Square (food court), Hartford, CT
data.short_description: Mezzie's Ice Cream & Coffee is coming soon to the food court at State House Square in Downtown Hartford. The shop makes ice cream in an Italian gelato machine for a silky texture and will serve New Harvest Coffee. No opening date has been announced.

data.status: will close its doors on May 31st
data.short_description: Home Restaurant has announced it will close its doors on May 31st after 14 years in operation, having originally opened in 2012. Owner Jared Schulefand stated the closure was a hard but necessary decision, noting patrons can visit the owner's other restaurant concepts.

data.location: 100 North Water Street (The Sono Collection, restaurant level), Norwalk, CT
data.short_description: Construction on Sally's Apizza at The SoNo Collection is continuing with exterior walls removed and new glass storefront windows installed, despite an ongoing lawsuit from the landlord alleging over $1.5 million in back-rent and damages. New Haven-based Sally's Apizza originally signed a lease at the location in 2019 with the opening timeline updated multiple times.

Bagel City opened on May 12th at 590 Main Street in Monroe, the former Sip & Scoop ice cream shop location. The family-owned halal bagelry features fresh-made bagels, breakfast and lunch sandwiches, pastries, salads, coffees, and a wide variety of bagel and cream cheese flavors.

Norwalk Bagel Company opened on May 15th at 133 Washington Street in Norwalk, the former Pokemoto space. The shop is owned by Chef Gary King and Pastry Chef Emily King, the same team behind award-winning Ridgefield Bagels & Bakes, and serves a variety of bagels, sandwiches, coffees, and espresso beverages.

data.location: 1115 Riverdale Street (Riversale Center), West Springfield, MA
data.short_description: Yemerica Coffee is coming soon to 1115 Riverdale Street in West Springfield, located between Table & Vine and Hot Table Panini at Riversale Center. The cafe blends traditional Yemeni and American coffee cultures and will be the fourth Yemerica Coffee location.

Morán Honduras Restaurant reopened at 534 Middle Turnpike East in Manchester under new ownership after briefly closing to complete the ownership transfer. The menu features nachos, burritos, quesadillas, pupusas, tacos, burgers, salads, and Hispanic breakfast options.

data.location: 117 Washington Avenue (Washington Commons shopping center), North Haven, CT
data.short_description: 7 Brew Coffee has set June 8th as the official opening date for its new North Haven drive-thru location at 117 Washington Avenue. The opening festivities include a "Pay What You Want" charity weekend May 29–31 benefiting The Animal Haven and Friends & Family free-drink days June 5–7.

The Wok Chinese Kitchen is coming soon to the former Five Guys space at 440 Boston Post Road in Orange, serving Chinese cuisine in a fast-casual format. It is a growing chain with 3 existing Pennsylvania locations and additional openings planned in New Jersey.
Five Guys closed abruptly in late 2025 at 440 Boston Post Road in Orange after over two decades of business at that location. The space is now being taken over by The Wok Chinese Kitchen.

data.event_date: May 12, 2026 (ribbon cutting described as "yesterday" in the 5/13 article)
data.short_description: Two Trees Inn officially reopened with a ribbon cutting ceremony attended by members of the Mashantucket Pequot Tribal Nation and the new operator, Waterford Hotel Group. The 280-room hotel features an indoor pool, fitness center, walking trails, on-site breakfast, and a bar with light bites.
